essential_assertions.text: assert(wb % wa == 0) by { assert(wb == wa * 2); lemma_mod_multiples_basic(2, wa); assert((2 * wa) % wa == 0); lemma_mul_is_commutative(2, wa); };
assert(gcd(wa, wb) == gcd(wb, wa)) by { small_mod(wa, wb); };

assert forall|ai: int, bi: int| 1 <= ai && ai < n && ai < bi && bi <= n implies #[trigger] gcd(ai, bi) <= result by { gcd_bound(ai, bi); // gcd(ai, bi) * 2 <= bi <= n // So gcd(ai, bi) <= n/2 = result
